parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: "05_cf", version: "v4.0", status: "error", error: $json.error, project_id: $json.metadata?.project_id || "", timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  workflow: '05_cf',
  version: 'v4.0',
  status: 'success',
  project_id: $json.batch_info.project_id,
  niche: $json.batch_info.niche,
  factors_count: $json.cf_info.factors_count,
  ml_score: $json.ml_cf_score,
  nocodb_saved: $json.nocodb_saved,
  qdrant_saved: !!$json.qdrant_point_id,
  groq_tokens: $json.cf_info.groq_tokens || 0,
  competitors_analyzed: $json.batch_info.competitors_analyzed || 0,
  warnings: ($json.cf_info.warnings || []).join('; '),
  timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
}) }}
